summary: Comprehensive testing of Mitarbeiter (Employee) Signup page at /mitarbeiter/signup. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 6 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Signup form correctly validates all required fields before submission
Password mismatch validation works correctly on frontend
POST /api/applications/submit correctly creates new user with 'Neu' status
Duplicate email registration correctly rejected with 400 status
Login endpoint correctly authenticates newly created accounts
Password is hashed and not stored/returned in plain text
All form fields have data-testid attributes for testing
Tooltip icons work correctly - display explanations when clicked
Redirect to login page works after 2 second delay post-registration

test_credentials.note: Multiple test users created during testing with unique timestamps

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created via signup form during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mitarbeiter Signup page is fully functional. Form validation, registration, login after signup, and tooltip functionality all work correctly. Backend properly validates required fields and handles duplicate emails. New users get 'Neu' status upon registration.

features_tested.signup_form_loads: PASS - All 9 form fields present with data-testid attributes
features_tested.empty_field_validation: PASS - Shows 'Bitte füllen Sie alle Pflichtfelder aus' error
features_tested.password_mismatch_validation: PASS - Shows 'Die Passwörter stimmen nicht überein' error
features_tested.successful_registration: PASS - Creates account and shows success message
features_tested.redirect_to_login: PASS - Automatically redirects to /mitarbeiter/login after 2 seconds
features_tested.login_with_new_account: PASS - Successfully logs in and redirects to dashboard
features_tested.tooltip_icons: PASS - 10 help icons present, clicking displays tooltip explanations

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all tests use real backend endpoints
